name: event-sdk-generator-starter
description: Specification-driven Event SDK Generator with TypeScript, Java, Python, and Go targets.

scripts.generate:ts: pnpm build:cli && pnpm cli generate --target typescript
scripts.generate:java: pnpm build:cli && pnpm cli generate --target java
scripts.generate:python: pnpm build:cli && pnpm cli generate --target python
scripts.generate:go: pnpm build:cli && pnpm cli generate --target go
scripts.test:ci:python: python3 -m compileall packages/runtime-python/src && PYTHONPATH=packages/runtime-python/src python3 -m unittest discover -s packages/runtime-python/tests
scripts.test:ci: pnpm test:ci:packages && pnpm test:ci:java && pnpm test:ci:python && pnpm test:ci:go
